name: CSP International Fashion Group S.p.A.
summary: CSP International Fashion Group S.p.A. produces and sells women's hosiery and underwear in Italy, France, and internationally. It offers stockings, tights, corsetry, lingerie, beachwear and bath suits, fashion, and bodywear for women, as well as underwear for men. The company provides its products under the Orobl√É¬π, Luna di Seta, Le Bourget, Lepel, Sanpellegrino, Well, Perofil, Cagi, and Bikkembergs brands. It sells its products through agents, merchandisers, promoters, and distributors, as well as through its stores and online shops. The company was founded in 1973 and is based in Ceresara, Italy.
